stories.title: Mayor Zamora: Let Estrada answer the charges and prove his innocence
stories.summary:
Mayor Zamora: Let Estrada answer the charges and prove his innocence.

MANILA, Philippines — San Juan City Mayor Francis Zamora called on the public to respect due process and “allow legal process to take its course” as Sen. Jinggoy Estrada, a fellow San Juaneño, faces charges in connection with the flood control projects scandal.

Zamora said this as he referred to the Sandiganbayan as the proper.

stories.title: Erwin Tulfo tells Cayetano: Consult our Senate psychiatrist
stories.summary:
Erwin Tulfo tells Cayetano: Consult our Senate psychiatrist. MANILA, Philippines — Senator Erwin Tulfo on Tuesday told Senate president Alan Peter Cayetano to consult a psychiatrist after the latter criticized him and his brother, Sen. Raffy Tulfo, amid a standoff between the Senate majority and minority blocs.

According to Tulfo, Cayetano may just simply be stressed, which is why he should consider consulting.

stories.title: Man dead after getting shot in knee during Pasig anti-drug op
stories.summary:
Man dead after getting shot in knee during Pasig anti-drug op. MANILA, Philippines — A man died after sustaining a gunshot wound in the knee during an anti-illegal drug operation in Pasig City, according to a police report obtained by the Inquirer.

It only identified the suspect as a 31-year-old Pasig City-based porter with the alias “Jon.” Personnel from the Pasig City Police Station-San Joaquin Substation.

stories.title: Cops seize P3.3-M ‘shabu’ in Iloilo drug sting
stories.summary:
Cops seize P3.3-M ‘shabu’ in Iloilo drug sting. ILOILO CITY, Philippines — Police seized over P3.3 million worth of suspected “shabu” and arrested three suspects during a buy-bust operation in Balasan town on Monday, June 1.

A 14-year-old girl, identified as the granddaughter of the primary target, was also rescued during the operation and turned over to local social welfare authorities. Police identified.

stories.title: Court junks bid of Zaldy Co’s co-accused to dismiss malversation case
stories.summary:
Court junks bid of Zaldy Co’s co-accused to dismiss malversation case. MANILA, Philippines — The Sandiganbayan Sixth Division has junked the petition of resigned Ako Bicol Rep. Zaldy Co’s co-accused to dismiss the malversation case against them.

The non-bailable malversation of funds case, through falsification of public documents, stems from a Sunwest project — or the company where Co is said to be a beneficial owner — worth P289.4.
